title: Physical system nodes
description: Schema for shared/physical_system_nodes.csv. Physical system nodes are grouping and navigation metadata only. They MUST NOT define coverage obligations, residual semantics, or any first-class ontology that competes with shared/roles.csv. Roles are the authoritative coverage objects; this file exists only to host genuinely non-role grouping nodes (such as broad navigation clusters or boundary anchors). Nodes that exist only as 1:1 wrappers around a role must be removed rather than retained here. The file may be renamed in a later cleanup to reflect this narrower navigation purpose.

description.description: Plain-language description of the grouping or navigation node.

parent_node_id.description: Parent physical node identifier. Blank only for the root node.

node_kind.description: Grouping/navigation node class. Permitted values cover only genuinely non-role grouping: root for the navigation root, cluster for broad navigation groups, intermediate_anchor for shared host or boundary groupings that are not themselves roles, and export_anchor for the export-gate boundary grouping. Role-anchor and residual-anchor semantics are not allowed: any node that mirrors a role 1:1 must be removed rather than represented here, and residual placeholder semantics live at the representation layer through representation_kind = residual_stub.

boundary.description: Physical boundary represented by the grouping node.

display_order.description: Stable ordering for navigation and documentation.
